_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on laws, regulations, and/or policies.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in regulatory horizon scanning, including monitoring legislative developments across relevant jurisdictions, assessing organizational impact of proposed and enacted regulations, and planning compliance adaptation timelines.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.620), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.592).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.639). Shared vocabulary: [impact, regulations]. DCWF-only terms [ability, assess, emerging, laws, monitor, policies] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, adaptation, assessing, compliance, developments, enacted] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.892, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to monitor and assess the potential impact of emerging technologies on l" and "Skill in regulatory horizon scanning, including monitoring legislative developme" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.637 ≈ STS 0.639 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [impact, regulations] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [impact, regulations]. DCWF-only: [ability, assess, emerging, laws, monitor, policies]. WIDAI-only: [across, adaptation, assessing, compliance, developments, enacted].
